title: Drift Report Specification
description: Schema for a drift report comparing current results vs a baseline to identify output drift.

baseline_ref.description: The reference digest or ID for the baseline.

current_ref.description: The current digest or ID being tested for drift.

drift_detected.description: Boolean indicating if drift was detected beyond acceptable thresholds.

evidence.description: A list of metric comparisons and delta details for detected drift.

baseline_value.description: Value of the metric in the baseline.

current_value.description: Value of the metric in the current run.

delta.description: Numerical difference between current and baseline values if applicable.
